title: Cobblestone Generator
description: Generates infinite cobblestone by combining flowing lava and water. Lava flows from a source into a channel where water meets it — the collision produces cobblestone at the meeting point. A piston breaks the cobblestone block and a hopper below collects it, or the player manually mines it. Place lava source on one end of a 1-block trench, water source on the other end 4 blocks away. The cobblestone spawns 1 block from the lava. Optional: observer+piston makes it automatic; a clock-piston breaks blocks repeatedly.
